scripts.title: Normal Operation Narrative
scripts.openingCaption: HyperStack is the operating system of AI infrastructure, continuously converting operational proof into financial value.
scripts.closingCaption: In normal operation, HyperStack behaves like a continuous value engine, improving performance, proving KPIs, and supporting capital efficiency.

steps.headline: Field performance becomes trusted digital proof.
steps.caption: Physical assets publish verified operating state into AIMEPS, creating a trusted real-time foundation for machine decisions and financial confidence.

steps.headline: Signals are standardized, routed, and optimized.
steps.caption: AIMEPS packages forecasts and optimization signals, while GTL-Link routes them into ASHS for supervisory action across the stack.

steps.headline: Autonomous control lifts KPI quality.
steps.caption: ASHS executes autonomous control downstream, tightening dispatch, preserving reserve margin, and improving efficiency in measurable terms.

steps.headline: Operational gains become visible financial value.
steps.caption: Financial protocol posts realized value and EOP surfaces an investor-ready operating picture in near real time for portfolio oversight.

scripts.title: Black Start Narrative
scripts.openingCaption: Black Start is the resilience story: crisis contained, recovery coordinated, stability restored, and value protected.
scripts.closingCaption: The black-start sequence ends with stabilized KPIs, recovered confidence, and a clear demonstration that resilience preserves asset value.

steps.headline: Instability is detected before value loss cascades.
steps.caption: The sequence opens in crisis, with AIMEPS detecting instability early enough to contain performance loss before it spreads across the system.

steps.headline: Recovery begins through controlled engine restart.
steps.caption: ASHS and GTL-Link restart the system in a disciplined sequence, translating recovery logic into controlled physical restoration.

steps.headline: Restored operations recover KPIs and confidence.
steps.caption: The system stabilizes and then improves, with recovered KPIs making resilience visible in both operational and financial terms.

scripts.title: Peak Load Narrative
scripts.openingCaption: Peak Load is the margin story: stress arrives, AI responds, efficiency improves, and delivered cost comes down.
scripts.closingCaption: Peak load ends with lower delivered cost, stronger efficiency, and a clearer demonstration that HyperStack protects value under pressure.

steps.headline: Load pressure appears, but the system sees it early.
steps.caption: The sequence begins in stress as load surges, but early forecasting creates room for margin-preserving intervention before degradation spreads.

steps.headline: AI reallocates capacity to protect efficiency.
steps.caption: ASHS reallocates capacity and coordinates response pathways to protect uptime, cooling balance, and fleet efficiency in real time.

steps.headline: Operational efficiency converts into cleaner margin.
steps.caption: The financial layer converts better dispatch into reduced cost, stronger margin quality, and more credible value capture under stress.

scripts.title: KPI Settlement Narrative
scripts.openingCaption: KPI Settlement is the monetization story: performance is measured, contract logic is applied, settlement is executed, and investor return is published.
scripts.closingCaption: The settlement sequence ends with auditable investor return, turning verified infrastructure performance into capital outcomes.

steps.headline: Verified KPI proof is assembled across the stack.
steps.caption: The sequence starts with measurement, assembling verified operating proof across the stack as the basis for payout and confidence.

steps.headline: Contract logic converts proof into cashflow.
steps.caption: The financial protocol applies contract logic and settlement rules, converting KPI proof into enforceable cashflow allocation.

steps.headline: EOP publishes a capital-grade outcome.
steps.caption: The process ends in investor return, as EOP publishes a capital-grade result built from verified settlement and portfolio visibility.
